name: Split core
summary: Implement the next downstream command: scoped pairtools-compatible split for pairsam output.
goal: Implement oracle-tested `pairs-rs split` for small pairsam inputs, producing pairs output and SAM stream output.
explicit_non_goals: Do not implement restrict, phase, sample, scaling, filterbycov, parse2, or header behavior.
Do not broaden parse, sort, select, merge, dedup, or stats behavior.
Do not implement every pairtools split edge case in one milestone.
Do not benchmark or claim speedup.
acceptance_criteria: `pairs-rs split` produces pairs output and SAM stream output matching selected stable pairtools oracle content on committed small pairsam fixtures.
`--output-pairs` and `--output-sam` support file and stdout routing needed by the hybrid pipeline.
Unsupported split options fail loudly with `not implemented`.
known_risks: Pairtools split has SAM header and record reconstruction details that need focused oracle fixtures.
